response.justification: While the candidate has strong full-stack and polyglot programming experience, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both of which are mandatory for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to academic or personal projects (e.g., bachelor’s thesis), and his recent work is entirely in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Demonstrated ability to work in CI/CD and DevOps environments
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
Lacks any demonstrable fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in enterprise financial systems
